item.title: OptaAnalyst: Opta Analyst @OptaAnalyst · 5min Last season, Newcastle dropped just seven points from winning positions in the Premier
item.description:
Opta Analyst @OptaAnalyst · 5min Last season, Newcastle dropped just seven points from winning positions in the Premier League, the fewest in the division.
This season, they have dropped 25 points from winning positions, at least five more than any other Premier League team.
#NUFC 3 1 1 mil

item.title: OptaAnalyst: Opta Analyst @OptaAnalyst · 1min En respuesta a @OptaAnalyst Newcastle United are 14th in the Premier League with six g
item.description:
Opta Analyst @OptaAnalyst · 1min En respuesta a @OptaAnalyst Newcastle United are 14th in the Premier League with six games left, but could also still qualify for Europe.
How the next few weeks go could make a huge difference to how progress under Eddie Howe is viewed. De theanalyst.com 1 282

item.title: tabuteauS: Sam Tabuteau @tabuteauS · 6min Rodrigo Bentancur is back in training for Tottenham ahead of crucial clash at home to Bri
item.description: Sam Tabuteau @tabuteauS · 6min Rodrigo Bentancur is back in training for Tottenham ahead of crucial clash at home to Brighton. Vicario not spotted in training after hernia surgery. Youngster Tyler Tingey trained with Roberto De Zerbi’s side after signing first pro deal #THFC De standard.co.uk 136

item.title: JamesPearceLFC: James Pearce @JamesPearceLFC · 6min Scans yet to confirm the full extent of the damage - but fears that Hugo Ekitike has
item.description: James Pearce @JamesPearceLFC · 6min Scans yet to confirm the full extent of the damage - but fears that Hugo Ekitike has ruptured his Achilles tendon. Facing a lengthy spell on the sidelines. De nytimes.com 9 5 67 5 mil
